code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut current = ""
mut idx = 0
mut first = true
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if idx % 2 == 0
        if first
          result = current
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{current}"
        end
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  if idx % 2 == 0
    if first
      result = current
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{current}"
    end
  end
end

println(result)
